Package javadraw.internal

Class ObjectDrawShape

java.lang.Object
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawObject
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawShape
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Dependent, DrawableInterface
Direct Known Subclasses:
Animation, Line, ObjectDrawPolygon, ObjectDrawRectangularShape, Text, Turtle
@Deprecated public abstract class ObjectDrawShape extends ObjectDrawObject implements DrawableInterface, Serializable
Deprecated.
